mapper.select: SELECT id, prediction_id, person_id, person_name, prediction_batch, prediction_rank, longitude, latitude, location_desc, probability, predict_minutes_ahead, predict_time, predict_window_start, predict_window_end, area_code, area_name, is_sensitive_area, sensitive_area_type, crowd_risk_level, model_version, confidence, feature_snapshot, status, create_time, update_time FROM trajectory_prediction WHERE person_id = #{personId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY predict_time DESC, prediction_rank ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, prediction_id, person_id, person_name, prediction_batch, prediction_rank, longitude, latitude, location_desc, probability, predict_minutes_ahead, predict_time, predict_window_start, predict_window_end, area_code, area_name, is_sensitive_area, sensitive_area_type, crowd_risk_level, model_version, confidence, feature_snapshot, status, create_time, update_time FROM trajectory_prediction WHERE prediction_batch = #{predictionBatch} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY prediction_rank ASC

SELECT id, prediction_id, person_id, person_name, prediction_batch, prediction_rank, longitude, latitude, location_desc, probability, predict_minutes_ahead, predict_time, predict_window_start, predict_window_end, area_code, area_name, is_sensitive_area, sensitive_area_type, crowd_risk_level, model_version, confidence, feature_snapshot, status, create_time, update_time FROM trajectory_prediction WHERE probability >= #{minProbability}
AND is_sensitive_area = 1
AND crowd_risk_level >= 2
AND (is_sensitive_area = 1 OR crowd_risk_level >= 2)
AND predict_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY probability DESC LIMIT 100
mapper.update: UPDATE trajectory_prediction SET crowd_risk_level = #{crowdRiskLevel}, crowd_count = #{crowdCount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE prediction_id = #{predictionId}
